data.name: Elena Vasquez
data.bio: Elena Vasquez is a visual storyteller based in Copenhagen, working across architecture, landscape, and fine art photography. Her work has been featured in Kinfolk, Cereal Magazine, and exhibited at galleries in Berlin and Stockholm. With a background in architecture and a deep love for natural light, she approaches every project as a study in atmosphere — seeking the quiet moments where space, light, and time converge. When not behind the lens, she teaches workshops on visual composition and travels in search of the next extraordinary ordinary scene.
